description: You are a Java developer modernizing a legacy HR system at /home/ga/legacy-hr-system. Modernize the project from Java 8 to Java 17 by replacing all java.util.Date and java.util.Calendar usages with the java.time API in Employee.java, PayrollCalculator.java, ReportGenerator.java, and HrApplication.java. Add generic type parameters to all raw-type collections in EmployeeDirectory.java, PayrollCalculator.java, and ReportGenerator.java. Replace all StringBuffer usages with StringBuilder in EmployeeDirectory.java and ReportGenerator.java. Update the Maven compiler source and target in pom.xml to 17. Verify the modernization by ensuring 'mvn clean test' passes.

metadata.legacy_1: java.util.Date/Calendar in Employee.java, PayrollCalculator.java, ReportGenerator.java, HrApplication.java
metadata.legacy_2: Raw type List/Map in EmployeeDirectory.java, PayrollCalculator.java, ReportGenerator.java
metadata.legacy_4: pom.xml compiler source/target set to 8 instead of 17
